name: Team Kaine
subject: Democrats can still pick up another Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

We wanted to make sure you saw this important note from Tim Kaine about Mike Espy's Senate race in Mississippi. [The tie-breaking runoff election is this Tuesday, November 27th, and he has a chance to win -- but only if we all pitch in to help.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744e7/3146891984/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+The+tiebreaking+runoff+election+is+this+&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

Having Mike in the Senate would be huge for Mississippians and all Americans. So we're asking one more time before his election -- will you make sure he has the resources he needs to win on Tuesday? You can send him an online donation right now using this link: [https://secure.timkaine.com/Mike-Espy](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744e6/3146891984/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomMikeEspy&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

Thank you -- Tim needs more progressive allies in the Senate, and Mississippi needs Mike Espy.

_-Team Kaine_

\-----------Forwarded Message-----------
From: **Tim Kaine**
Date: [Thurs Nov 15, 2018 at 3:37 pm](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744e5/3146891984/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Thurs+Nov+15+2018+at+337+pm&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")
Subject: Mike Espy

Friend:

On Election Day -- and in the days since -- we focused a lot on some great wins and some tough losses. But in Mississippi, there was no final answer -- Democrat Mike Espy tied his opponent, the Republican incumbent.

**This is a big deal. We have a real shot at picking up a Senate seat in Mississippi in a November 27th runoff. But that can't happen if Democrats like us sit this race out.** [**Mike needs our help.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744e4/3146891984/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?amount=35&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Mike+needs+our+help&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

In less than two weeks, Mississippians will head to the polls again to break the tie. Mike is a former Congressman and U.S. Secretary of Agriculture who has fought for job creation in Mississippi and to defend people's health care. In the Senate, he would help a lot of Mississippians -- and he'd make history as their first African American senator since Reconstruction. **If we jump in now, he can win this thing:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744fb/3146891984/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+15&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")
---
| [**$50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744fa/3146891984/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+50&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f9/3146891984/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?amount=25&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")
---
I'll tell you what, we could really use Mike's help in the Senate. With a new balance of power in the House, we've got a chance to get things done that help the American people -- but we need to secure as many Senate seats as we can in order to really turn the tide. Mike would be a critical vote to help us protect and expand health care and safeguard Social Security -- things we have absolutely got to do. We saw what happened last year in Alabama, when Senator Doug Jones won his special election runoff. We got one more key vote in the Senate to help make progress for Americans. [**So today I'm asking you to join me in standing with Mike, so we can do the same in Mississippi.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f8/3146891984/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?amount=35&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+So+today+Im+asking+you+to+join+me+in+sta&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

Republican dark money groups are already up on the air in Mississippi, smearing Mike's record. They're running scared -- and they're right to be. **Chip in today to help Mike bring home this win and join me in the Senate. You can use this link:** [**https://secure.timkaine.com/Mike-Espy**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744ff/3146891984/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?amount=35&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimkainecomMikeEspy&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

Thank you,

_-Tim_
[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744fe/3146891984/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-espy?amount=35&refcode=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")
---

* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744fd/3146891984/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744fc/3146891984/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f3/3146891984/VEsHBg/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f2/3146891984/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f1/3146891984/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f0/3146891984/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175f/3e0906/7a2feaa0/3e3744f7/3146891984/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=17+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd&source=20181124_1_FR_TEAM_Espy-fwd")

| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
